title: Reionization Topology as a Probe of Self-Interacting Dark Matter
summary: We introduce a framework connecting dark matter self-interactions (SIDM) to the large-scale topology of cosmic reionization in this paper. SIDM core formation reduces the gas binding energy in high-$z$ halos, enhancing supernova-driven clearing of ionizing-photon escape channels. We decompose the observable signatures into two scale-dependent levers a percent-level shift in the emissivity-weighted halo bias $b_γ$ that modifies large-scale 21\,cm power, and a factor of 2--4 suppression of emissivity shot noise from increased duty cycles that reshapes intermediate-scale ionization morphology. We derive analytic predictions for the 21\,cm power spectrum ratio and validate them with a halo-by-halo semi-numerical excursion-set framework at $128^3$ resolution where individual halo duty-cycle stochasticity is resolved. For $σ/m = 1$--$10\;\mathrm{cm^2/g}$, we find $\sim 60$--$80\%$ suppression of emissivity shot-noise power, a $12$--$21\%$ reduction in the emissivity variance ratio $\langle \dot{N}^2\rangle/\langle\dot{N}\rangle^2$, and a $50$--$110\%$ increase in the Euler characteristic of the ionization field at fixed $\bar{x}_{\rm HI} = 0.5$. SIDM produces more numerous, more uniformly distributed HII bubbles compared to CDM's topology of fewer large bubbles around rare bright sources. Theintermediate scale signatures are potentially detectable by SKA1-Low in $\sim 1000$ hours. Our results establish reionization topology as a new, complementary probe of dark matter microphysics at mass scales $M \sim 10^{10}$--$10^{11}\,M_\odot$ and redshifts $z \sim 6$--$10$.

AI.tldr: 该研究建立了一个连接暗物质自相互作用与宇宙再电离大尺度拓扑结构的框架，发现暗物质自相互作用通过影响高红移晕核形成，增强了电离光子逃逸通道，从而改变了21厘米功率谱和电离形态。
AI.motivation: 探索暗物质自相互作用如何通过影响高红移晕的核形成和气体结合能，进而改变宇宙再电离过程的拓扑结构，为暗物质微观物理提供新的探测手段。
AI.method: 开发了一个连接暗物质自相互作用与再电离的框架，将观测特征分解为两个尺度相关的杠杆：发射率加权晕偏置的变化和大尺度21厘米功率的修改，以及发射率散粒噪声的抑制。使用解析预测和128^3分辨率的半数值excursion-set框架进行验证。
AI.result: 对于σ/m = 1-10 cm²/g的暗物质自相互作用，发现发射率散粒噪声功率被抑制60-80%，发射率方差比减少12-21%，在固定中性氢分数为0.5时电离场的欧拉特征增加50-110%。与冷暗物质相比，自相互作用暗物质产生更多、更均匀分布的HII气泡。
AI.conclusion: 再电离拓扑结构可作为探测暗物质微观物理的新互补手段，适用于质量尺度M~10^10-10^11 M⊙和红移z~6-10的范围，其中间尺度特征可能被SKA1-Low在约1000小时内探测到。

title: Global m=1 slow mode in near-Keplerian self-gravitating torus: applications to stellar nuclear disks and AGN molecular tori
summary: Global m=1 asymmetries are observed in many self-gravitating astrophysical systems and are often interpreted as large-scale slow modes in near-Keplerian potentials. Prominent examples include eccentric nuclear disks in galactic centres, such as the double nucleus of M31. However, the origin and long-term stability of such modes remain unclear. We investigate the evolution and stability of a collisionless, self-gravitating torus orbiting a dominant central mass, aiming to determine whether a slow non-axisymmetric (m=1) mode can arise spontaneously. We perform direct N-body simulations exploring different torus-to-central mass ratios and initial conditions. The calculations use the high-order Hermite GPU integrator (φ-GPU), allowing us to follow long-term evolution with many particles. We find that a global slow m=1 mode forms spontaneously from initially axisymmetric configurations. The lopsided structure is sustained by coherent apsidal alignment and persists over secular timescales. Its maintenance requires nonlinear coupling of low-order modes, including the m=3 component, as well as a sufficient vertical thickness of the torus. As a result of the long-lived overdensity, the central mass is displaced from the system barycenter. These results provide a framework for understanding eccentric nuclear disks, such as those in M31 and NGC4486B, as well as molecular tori in AGNs, and suggest that such asymmetries may produce observable offsets of the central supermassive black hole.

AI.tldr: 研究通过N体模拟发现，自引力环在中心质量主导的系统中会自发形成长期稳定的全局m=1非对称模式，这为理解偏心核盘等天体结构提供了框架。
AI.motivation: 许多自引力天体系统中观测到全局m=1不对称性（如M31的双核结构），但其起源和长期稳定性尚不清楚。研究旨在探索这种慢模式是否能从轴对称构型中自发产生。
AI.method: 使用高阶Hermite GPU积分器（φ-GPU）进行直接N体模拟，研究不同环-中心质量比和初始条件。模拟追踪了具有大量粒子的碰撞less自引力环在中心质量主导势场中的长期演化。
AI.result: 从初始轴对称构型中自发形成了全局慢m=1模式。这种偏斜结构由相干近星点对齐维持，在长期时间尺度上持续存在。其维持需要低阶模式（包括m=3分量）的非线性耦合以及足够厚的垂直厚度。长期存在的过密度导致中心质量相对于系统质心发生位移。
AI.conclusion: 结果为理解偏心核盘（如M31和NGC4486B）以及活动星系核中的分子环提供了框架，表明这种不对称性可能导致中心超大质量黑洞产生可观测的偏移。

title: Scale-dependent surface and volume density properties of filaments in molecular clouds
comment: 23 pages, 17 figures, submitted to Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We present a systematic analysis of scale-dependent properties of filamentary structures in seven nearby molecular clouds -- Taurus, Ophiuchus, Perseus, Orion A, California, IC 5146, and Vela C -- using the multiscale extraction method getsf. Alongside the usual surface density profiles $Σ(r)$, we derive volume density profiles $ρ(r)$ for a large sample of filaments, providing new observational constraints on their three-dimensional structure. Filament widths increase systematically with spatial scale, following power laws $\tilde{H} \propto Y^{0.50}$ and $\tilde{h} \propto Y^{0.37}$, with distributions spanning $\sim$ 0.01--1 pc across all scales, challenging the notion of a universal filament width of $\sim$ 0.1 pc. The median volume density slopes $\tildeβ \approx 2.1$--$2.4$ are systematically lower than the value $β= 4$ expected for an isothermal cylinder in hydrostatic equilibrium. Volume density contrasts are substantially higher than surface density contrasts ($\tilde{C}_ρ \approx 17$--$52$ vs. $\tilde{C}_Σ \approx 1.1$--$2.7$), confirming that filaments are substantially more prominent in three dimensions than their projected appearance suggests. The median linear densities of filaments increase linearly with spatial scale, $\tildeΛ \propto Y$, with the fraction of supercritical filaments ($Λ> 15\,M_\odot$ pc$^{-1}$) increasing strongly with scale and varying widely among clouds, from $\sim$ 7% in Taurus and Ophiuchus to $\sim$ 54% in Vela C, broadly consistent with the known star formation activity of the clouds. Measured filament widths and slopes depend systematically on angular resolution and distance, highlighting the importance of accounting for resolution bias in comparative filament studies.

AI.tldr: 该研究对七个邻近分子云中的丝状结构进行了多尺度分析，发现丝状宽度随空间尺度系统增加，挑战了0.1 pc通用宽度的概念，并揭示了三维密度对比远高于二维投影观测结果。
AI.motivation: 传统研究认为分子云中的丝状结构具有约0.1 pc的通用宽度，但这一观点主要基于二维投影观测。本研究旨在通过多尺度分析方法，探究丝状结构的三维特性，特别是宽度、密度分布和线性密度随空间尺度的变化规律。
AI.method: 使用多尺度提取方法getsf对七个邻近分子云（金牛座、蛇夫座、英仙座、猎户座A、加利福尼亚、IC 5146和Vela C）中的丝状结构进行系统分析。除了常规的表面密度剖面Σ(r)，还推导了大量丝状结构的体积密度剖面ρ(r)，为三维结构提供了新的观测约束。
AI.result:
1. 丝状宽度随空间尺度系统增加，遵循幂律关系，分布范围跨越约0.01-1 pc，挑战了0.1 pc通用宽度的概念
2. 体积密度斜率中值约2.1-2.4，低于等温圆柱体在流体静力平衡下预期的β=4
3. 体积密度对比显著高于表面密度对比，证实丝状结构在三维空间中比投影观测更为突出
4. 线性密度中值随空间尺度线性增加，超临界丝状比例随尺度强烈增加，且在不同分子云中差异显著
5. 测量结果受角分辨率和距离影响，凸显了在比较研究中考虑分辨率偏差的重要性
AI.conclusion: 丝状结构具有尺度依赖的特性，其三维结构比二维投影观测更为复杂和突出。研究结果挑战了通用宽度的概念，强调了多尺度分析和考虑分辨率偏差的重要性。不同分子云中丝状特性的差异与其已知的恒星形成活动一致，为理解丝状结构在恒星形成中的作用提供了新的观测约束。

title: Impact of Stochastic Pop~III X-ray Binaries on the Cosmological 21-cm Signal
summary: High-mass X-ray binaries are one of the primary drivers of the 21-cm signal from Cosmic Dawn and Reionization, playing a leading role in the thermal history of the intergalactic medium. In traditional semi-numerical simulations, a deterministic scaling relation between the total X-ray luminosity of high-mass X-ray binaries, $L_{\rm X}$, and star formation rate (SFR) is usually adopted. However, this assumption is inaccurate for high-redshift low-SFR regions hosting few sources. The spatial variation in the number and luminosity of these sources is expected to enhance fluctuations in the Cosmic Dawn 21-cm signal. Here we quantify this effect by introducing a stochastic $L_{\rm X}$ model sampled from a power-law X-ray luminosity function. Implementing this in 21cmSPACE, a large-scale simulation framework of Cosmic Dawn and Reionization, we find that the stochasticity leads to enhanced fluctuations in X-ray heating rate fields, and affects the 21-cm power spectrum on small scales ($k>0.3~ \mathrm{cMpc^{-1}}$). The impact of stochasticity on the global 21-cm signal and on the large-scale power spectrum is found to be negligible. Our results suggest these effects will remain undetected by the upcoming Square Kilometer Array. However, large-scale lunar-based experiments may be sensitive to the signatures of stochastic X-ray heating at $z\sim 25$. Quantifying these corrections is a vital step toward robust 21-cm modeling and ensuring that future precision data interpretation is free from astrophysical biases.

AI.tldr: 该研究量化了高红移低恒星形成率区域中高质量X射线双星X射线光度随机性对宇宙黎明21厘米信号的影响，发现随机性增强了小尺度功率谱波动，但对全局信号和大尺度功率谱影响可忽略。
AI.motivation: 传统半数值模拟中通常采用高质量X射线双星总X射线光度与恒星形成率之间的确定性比例关系，但这种假设对于高红移低恒星形成率区域（包含少量源）是不准确的。这些源的数量和光度的空间变化预计会增强宇宙黎明21厘米信号的波动。
AI.method: 引入从幂律X射线光度函数采样的随机LX模型，并在21cmSPACE（宇宙黎明和再电离的大尺度模拟框架）中实现该模型，量化随机性对X射线加热率场和21厘米功率谱的影响。
AI.result: 随机性导致X射线加热率场的波动增强，并影响小尺度（k>0.3 cMpc^{-1}）的21厘米功率谱。随机性对全局21厘米信号和大尺度功率谱的影响可忽略。这些效应预计不会被即将建成的平方公里阵列探测到，但基于月球的大尺度实验可能对z~25处的随机X射线加热特征敏感。
AI.conclusion: 量化这些修正是实现稳健21厘米建模的关键步骤，确保未来精确数据解释不受天体物理偏差影响。随机X射线加热效应在特定条件下可被探测，为宇宙黎明研究提供了新的观测可能性。

title: Gas-rich ultra-diffuse galaxies: alleviating the MOND tension with HMG
summary: Gas-rich ultra-diffuse galaxies (UDGs) are an unusually sharp test for gravity models tied to the baryonic Tully--Fisher relation because several systems appear to rotate too slowly for their baryonic masses. This study revisits the six isolated gas-rich UDGs analysed by Mancera Piña et al. with the current outer-radius prescription of hyperconical modified gravity (HMG), using the published baryonic masses and circular velocities at the outer radii. The scan over the neighbourhood-scale parameter drives the model towards the asymptotic branch of HMG. For that limit, the HMG velocities are still systematically high for four of the six galaxies. Relative to the observed values, the fixed asymptotic branch gives $χ^2\simeq18.1$ for six objects, whereas Newtonian baryons alone give $χ^2\simeq9.7$, but MOND interpolation is much worse ($χ^2\simeq 615.7$). Using combined uncertainties, the per-galaxy HMG tension ranges from $0.2σ$ to $2.1σ$, very similar to the $0.1σ$ to $1.7σ$ found for Newtonian baryons, and much smaller than the $3.7σ$ to $5.9σ$ obtained for MOND. We conclude that the present outer-radius HMG implementation alleviates the difficulties of MOND, but is still not sufficient to account for the published central values of the UDG sample. Gas-rich UDGs therefore provide a useful discriminant between MOND and HMG.

AI.tldr: 研究重新评估六个孤立富气超弥散星系在超锥形修正引力理论下的表现，发现HMG模型比MOND表现更好，但仍无法完全解释观测数据。
AI.motivation: 富气超弥散星系因其旋转速度相对于重子质量过慢，成为检验与重子Tully-Fisher关系相关的引力模型的理想测试平台。本研究旨在评估超锥形修正引力理论是否能解释这些星系的异常观测数据。
AI.method: 使用Mancera Piña等人分析的六个孤立富气UDG数据，应用当前外半径处超锥形修正引力理论，扫描邻域尺度参数使模型趋向渐近分支，比较HMG、牛顿重子模型和MOND的预测与观测值。
AI.result: HMG模型预测速度仍系统性地高于六个星系中四个的观测值。固定渐近分支的χ²=18.1，牛顿重子模型χ²=9.7，而MOND表现最差(χ²=615.7)。HMG张力范围0.2σ-2.1σ，与牛顿模型相似(0.1σ-1.7σ)，远小于MOND的3.7σ-5.9σ。
AI.conclusion: 当前外半径HMG实现缓解了MOND的困难，但仍不足以完全解释UDG样本的观测数据。富气超弥散星系为区分MOND和HMG提供了有用的判别依据。

title: Starbursts at Cosmic Dawn: Formation of Globular Clusters, Ultra-Faint Dwarfs, and Population III star clusters at z > 6
comment: 153 pages, 27 figures. M.Sc. thesis defended in 2022 at Stockholm University (supervisor: Garrelt Mellema). For more recent modelling of the critical halo mass for star formation, and Ly$α$ stellar feedback, see arXiv:2303.08024 and arXiv:2409.19288, respectively. Original thesis can also be found at: https://www.diva-portal.org/smash/record.jsf?pid=diva2%3A1667717&dswid=-6362
summary:
In the standard model of cosmology ($Λ$CDM) the first stars, star clusters, and galaxies are expected to have formed in low-mass dark matter halos at high redshifts ($z \sim 6 - 30$). Attempts to predict the properties and abundances of these objects have mainly relied on numerically expensive cosmological simulations, which often lack the sub-parsec resolution needed to resolve compact star clusters and/or neglect potentially important stellar feedback processes. Motivated by this, I introduce Anaxagoras, a detailed analytical ab initio model of starbursts in low-mass halos. The model includes gas cooling, central gas accretion and disk formation, and stellar feedback from direct radiation pressure, Ly$α$ scattering and IR photons, stellar winds, expanding H II regions, and (crudely) supernovae.
  I apply Anaxagoras to star formation at $z > 6$ in satellite halos of the Milky Way, as well as to Population III (Pop III) star formation in minihalos. For the Milky Way setup, hundreds of galaxies are predicted to form with luminosities, half-mass radii, mass-to-light ratios, and ages in good agreement with the observed local population of Ultra-Faint Dwarfs. Furthermore, at least $\sim 40$ old globular cluster candidates with initial stellar masses $10^5 - 10^6\,M_\odot$ are predicted to form at the centers of low-mass halos. Finally, if Pop III stars are not overly massive ($25\,M_\odot$), between $\sim 1 - 30$ stars could form per minihalo at $z > 20$, increasing to $\sim 10 - 500$ at $z < 15$ as Lyman-Werner feedback delays star formation until halos reach larger masses; if Pop III stars are more massive ($140\,M_\odot$), most minihalos form just a single star.

AI.tldr: 作者开发了Anaxagoras模型，这是一个详细的解析模型，用于模拟低质量暗物质晕中的恒星形成，包括气体冷却、吸积盘形成和多种恒星反馈过程，并将其应用于高红移恒星形成和银河系卫星晕的研究。
AI.motivation: 标准宇宙学模型预测第一代恒星、星团和星系在高质量红移的低质量暗物质晕中形成。现有研究主要依赖计算昂贵的宇宙学模拟，这些模拟往往缺乏解析致密星团所需的分辨率，或者忽略了重要的恒星反馈过程。
AI.method: 作者引入了Anaxagoras模型，这是一个详细的解析从头计算模型，包括气体冷却、中心气体吸积和盘形成，以及来自直接辐射压、Lyα散射和IR光子、恒星风、膨胀H II区域和超新星（粗略处理）的恒星反馈。
AI.result: 对于银河系卫星晕，模型预测数百个星系形成，其光度、半质量半径、质量-光度比和年龄与观测到的本地超暗弱矮星系群一致。此外，预测在低质量晕中心形成至少约40个古老的球状星团候选体。对于第三星族恒星，如果质量不过大（25M⊙），每个迷你晕可能形成1-30颗恒星；如果质量更大（140M⊙），大多数迷你晕只形成单颗恒星。
AI.conclusion: Anaxagoras模型为研究高红移低质量晕中的恒星形成提供了一种有效的解析方法，能够预测与观测一致的星系和星团性质，并揭示了第三星族恒星形成对恒星质量的敏感性。

title: Galactic Archaeology with the Subaru `Ōnohi`ula Prime Focus Spectrograph Strategic Program
comment: The Galactic Archaeology science case for the Subaru Strategic Program for the `Ōnohi`ula Prime Focus Spectrograph. Not yet submitted to any journal
summary: The recently commissioned Subaru `Ōnohi`ula Prime Focus Spectrograph (PFS) will obtain spectra from nearly 2,400 fibers that cover 1.24 square degrees. The 360 night Subaru Strategic Program for PFS is dedicating approximately one-third of its allocation (130 nights) to study the structure and evolution of galaxies in the Local Group. This Galactic Archaeological survey has three pillars. (1) We will determine whether the mass density profiles of dwarf galaxies are consistent with cusps, as expected for cold dark matter, or cores, as expected from alternative dark matter theories or baryonic feedback. We will deduce the density profiles as a function of radius from modeling of the full line-of-sight velocity and abundance distributions for six dwarf galaxies. Our total sample will consist of 18,000 member stars to beyond the nominal tidal radius of each system. (2) From measurements of the [alpha/Fe] abundance ratio, we will learn the difference in assembly history of the two most massive galaxies in the Local Group: M31 and the Milky Way. We will observe 30,000 member stars over 45 square degrees of M31's halo and outer disk. (3) We will uncover how the most fragile (outer) part of the Milky Way responded to accretion events both in the distant past (such as Gaia-Sausage Enceladus) and in more recent history (such as the Sagittarius dwarf spheroidal galaxy). To support this study, PFS will provide velocities and metallicities--from which, in combination with photometry, we will deduce ages--for tens of thousands of main-sequence stars out to a Galactocentric distance of ~30 kpc.

AI.tldr: Subaru PFS望远镜将进行银河考古调查，通过光谱分析研究本地星系群的结构和演化，重点关注矮星系的暗物质分布、M31与银河系的形成历史差异，以及银河系外围区域对吸积事件的响应。
AI.motivation: 研究本地星系群中星系的结构和演化，特别是通过光谱数据解决暗物质分布、星系形成历史以及银河系外围区域对吸积事件的响应等关键天体物理学问题。
AI.method: 使用Subaru PFS望远镜的2400根光纤覆盖1.24平方度天区，通过光谱分析获取恒星的速度和金属丰度数据。具体包括：1) 对6个矮星系建模分析速度分布和丰度分布；2) 在M31晕和外围盘区观测3万颗成员星；3) 结合测光数据为银河系外围数万颗主序星确定年龄。
AI.result: 该调查将获得大量数据：18,000颗矮星系成员星数据、30,000颗M31成员星数据，以及银河系外围数万颗主序星的速度和金属丰度数据，这些数据将用于解决暗物质分布、星系形成历史和吸积事件影响等科学问题。
AI.conclusion: Subaru PFS的银河考古调查将通过大规模光谱观测，为理解本地星系群中星系的结构、暗物质性质、形成历史以及吸积事件的影响提供关键数据，推动星系形成和演化理论的发展。

title: Full-polarization millimeter wavelength variability of Sagittarius A* during the 2018 EHT campaign
summary: Sagittarius A* (Srg A*), the supermassive black hole at the center of the Milky Way, provides a unique laboratory to study accretion dynamics and plasma processes near the event horizon. We investigated the variability and polarization properties of Srg A* using ALMA observations during the 2018 Event Horizon Telescope campaign. We analyzed high-cadence full-polarization light curves from ALMA at millimeter wavelengths, performed time-series analysis, and investigated the temporal behavior during an X-ray flare observed by Chandra on 2018 April 24. The variability characteristics are compared with expectations from standard accretion flow models. We find low variability in total intensity ($σ/μ< 10\%$), but significantly higher variability in linear and circular polarization (~ 30% and ~ 50%, respectively). A time-series analysis reveals red-noise variability, with power spectral densities between -2 and -3 across all Stokes parameters. Polarized intensity shows stable intra-day timescales, while total intensity exhibits more variable timescales, suggesting distinct emission regions, with polarization likely arising from a coherent structure. On April 24, a statistically significant inter-band delay in polarized intensity coincides with a near-simultaneous X-ray and millimeter peak that deviates from the typical delayed flare scenario. This event also features enhanced millimeter variability and coherent polarization loop evolution. The observed simultaneity challenges standard models of transient synchrotron emission with cooling delays, favoring instead a scenario of continuous energy injection in an optically thin region. Our results offer new constraints on the physical mechanisms driving variability in Srg A*, and provide key observational input for refining theoretical models of accretion and plasma behavior in the vicinity of supermassive black holes.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA观测研究银河系中心超大质量黑洞Sgr A*的变异性与偏振特性，发现总强度变异性低但偏振变异性高，观测到与X射线耀斑同时发生的毫米波偏振延迟事件，挑战了标准冷却延迟模型。
AI.motivation: Sgr A*作为银河系中心的超大质量黑洞，为研究事件视界附近的吸积动力学和等离子体过程提供了独特实验室。通过分析其变异性与偏振特性，可以深入了解黑洞附近的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用ALMA在2018年事件视界望远镜观测期间的高时间分辨率全偏振光变曲线，进行时间序列分析，并研究与钱德拉X射线望远镜观测到的2018年4月24日X射线耀斑的关联。
AI.result: 总强度变异性低（σ/μ<10%），但线偏振和圆偏振变异性显著更高（分别约30%和50%）。时间序列分析显示红噪声变异性，功率谱密度在-2到-3之间。4月24日观测到偏振强度中统计显著的波段间延迟，与X射线和毫米波峰值几乎同时发生，偏离典型的延迟耀斑情景。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的同时性挑战了具有冷却延迟的标准瞬态同步辐射模型，更支持在光学薄区域中连续能量注入的情景。结果为驱动Sgr A*变异性的物理机制提供了新约束，并为完善超大质量黑洞附近吸积和等离子体行为的理论模型提供了关键观测输入。

title: Apparent Stability in Self-Gravitating Turbulence and the Evolution of Molecular Clouds
summary: Recent observations of hydrostatic structure and virial equilibrium in supersonically turbulent, self-gravitating molecular clouds imply a stability that contrasts with the transcience of turbulent structure. To investigate this contradiction, we model a molecular cloud as a turbulent eddy and study its evolution as a dynamical system. In a two-dimensional phase space of structure and energy, we find that the dynamical equilibrium is a saddle point, stable in the direction aligned with force balance, but unstable in the direction of energy balance because of the combination of the turbulent dissipation and the negative heat capacity of self-gravitation. Near the saddle point, evolutionary trajectories follow a characteristic pattern that first approaches the equilibrium before departing in the direction of instability. Since the phase-space speed is proportional to the virial and energy imbalance, trajectories slow near the equilibrium resulting in a local overdensity of clouds. Also, near equilibrium, the relaxation to force balance is faster than the growth rate of the instability in energy. Consequently, more clouds are observed in near equilibrium states with hydrostatic structure even though the equilibrium is metastable. This resolves the apparent contradiction of equilibrium structure observed in dynamically unstable, self-gravitating turbulence.

AI.tldr: 论文通过将分子云建模为湍流涡旋，在结构和能量的二维相空间中发现了动态平衡是一个鞍点，解释了分子云中观测到的静水结构稳定性与湍流结构短暂性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 分子云中观测到的静水结构和维里平衡表明稳定性，这与湍流结构的短暂性相矛盾。研究旨在解释这种矛盾，探讨自引力湍流中平衡结构的观测现象。
AI.method: 将分子云建模为湍流涡旋，在结构和能量的二维相空间中研究其演化动力学。分析动态平衡点的稳定性特征，特别是力平衡和能量平衡方向的稳定性差异。
AI.result: 发现动态平衡是一个鞍点：在力平衡方向稳定，但在能量平衡方向不稳定（由于湍流耗散和自引力的负热容）。演化轨迹先接近平衡点，然后沿不稳定方向离开，在平衡点附近形成云团局部过密度。
AI.conclusion: 力平衡的弛豫速度快于能量不稳定性的增长率，导致更多云团被观测到处于近平衡状态，解释了在动态不稳定的自引力湍流中观测到平衡结构的矛盾现象。

title: Low-ionization Metal Absorption at $0.7 \lesssim z \lesssim 2$ Confronting Cosmological Simulations with Observations
summary: Low-ionization metal absorption lines provide a primary probe of cool gas in and around galaxies. We confront observations of metal-line absorption in quasar spectra with predictions from the IllustrisTNG cosmological simulation in order to benchmark how well current galaxy formation models reproduce the observed circumgalactic medium (CGM) and intergalactic medium (IGM) absorption signatures. We implement two ionization prescriptions: a purely collisional model and a model including photo-ionization by a uniform ultraviolet background (UVB). Using a grid-based framework, we compute MgI, MgII and FeII column densities and construct column density probability distribution functions (PDFs) and equivalent width (EW) statistics for comparison with observations. The observational samples considered here are based on the High Resolution Echelle Spectrometer (HIRES), the Ultraviolet and Visual Echelle Spectrograph (UVES), the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS) and the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI). The computed PDFs broadly reproduce the observed ones across the sampled column density range of $10^{11.4}\lesssim \text{N}\lesssim 10^{16}\ \rm{cm^{-2}}$, indicating that the simulation captures the dominant physical drivers of low-ionization absorption. We then compute the cosmic incidence of MgII systems, namely the evolution of their number with redshift $d\mathcal{N}/{dz}$. The model that includes UVB accurately produces $d\mathcal{N}/{dz}$ up to equivalent widths (EW) of $\rm W_0^{2796} < 0.6\ \mathring{A}$, consistent with low-density photo-ionized gas in the outer CGM. At high EWs of $\rm W_0^{2796} > 1\ \mathring{A}$ TNG underestimates $d\mathcal{N}/{dz}$ and fails to capture its rise toward $z\sim2$.

AI.tldr: 研究使用IllustrisTNG宇宙学模拟对比观测数据，评估当前星系形成模型对低电离金属吸收线的再现能力，发现模拟能较好再现中等柱密度范围，但在高等效宽度区域低估了吸收系统的宇宙发生率。
AI.motivation: 低电离金属吸收线是探测星系内外冷气体的主要手段，研究旨在评估当前宇宙学模拟（IllustrisTNG）能否准确再现观测到的星系际介质和星系周围介质的吸收特征。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG宇宙学模拟，采用两种电离模型（纯碰撞模型和包含均匀紫外背景辐射的光电离模型），通过网格化框架计算MgI、MgII和FeII的柱密度，构建柱密度概率分布函数和等效宽度统计量，并与HIRES、UVES、SDSS和DESI等观测数据进行比较。
AI.result: 模拟计算的PDF在柱密度范围10^11.4-10^16 cm^-2内与观测基本一致，表明模拟捕捉到了低电离吸收的主要物理驱动因素。包含UVB的模型能准确再现等效宽度小于0.6Å的MgII系统的宇宙发生率，但在高等效宽度区域（>1Å）低估了发生率，且未能捕捉到其在z~2处的上升趋势。
AI.conclusion: IllustrisTNG模拟能较好地再现中等柱密度范围的观测特征，但在高等效宽度区域存在不足，表明当前星系形成模型在处理高密度星系周围介质方面仍有改进空间。
